name: Ronald Reagan's Corned Beef Hash in Bell Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown onions in olive oil until translucent.
2. Add diced potatoes and continue cooking for a few minutes.
3. Stir in chopped tomatoes, corned beef, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour in enough warm water to cover the ingredients slightly.
5. Simmer on low heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Cut off the tops of the bell peppers and remove seeds and core.
7. Parboil the bell peppers in a mixture of water and salt until tender but still with some crunch.
8. Drain the peppers and fill them almost to the top with the corned beef mixture.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes.
10. Five minutes before serving, crack an egg into each pepper half.
11. Return the peppers to the oven until the eggs are set, about 5 more minutes.
Recipe By:
